requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC for Iraq EV Charger Deployments
requirement_topic.zh: 伊拉克EV充电桩部署的OCPP互操作与EMC要求
requirement_topic.zht: 伊拉克EV充電樁部署的OCPP互操作與EMC要求

summary.en: Iraq EV charging deployments coordinated with the Ministry of Electricity (MoEL) and project operators are expected to use OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for back-office communication, in alignment with the IEC-based direction being adopted for Iraq's nascent EV infrastructure. OCPP compliance enables remote monitoring, fault notification, access control, and load management functions necessary for networked charger operation. EMC compliance under IEC 61000 is required for imported electrical equipment through COSQC; IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emissions) and IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations and flicker) apply to charger installations. Iraq's unstable grid environment makes EMC and power-quality design especially important for reliable charger operation. No single official Iraq OCPP mandate for EV chargers had been confirmed from official published sources as of 2026-06-14; confirm requirements with the specific project operator and MoEL.
summary.zh: 与伊拉克电力部（MoEL）和项目运营商协调的伊拉克EV充电桩部署，预期采用OCPP（开放充电点协议）进行后台通信，与伊拉克初期电动汽车基础设施正在采用的IEC体系方向保持一致。OCPP合规性支持联网充电桩运行所必需的远程监控、故障通知、访问控制和负载管理功能。进口电气设备通过COSQC须满足IEC 61000体系EMC合规要求；IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流发射）和IEC 61000-3-3（电压波动和闪变）适用于充电桩安装。伊拉克不稳定的电网环境使EMC和电能质量设计对于充电桩可靠运行尤为重要。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方已发布来源确认伊拉克针对EV充电桩的单一官方OCPP强制要求；应与具体项目运营商和MoEL确认。
summary.zht: 與伊拉克電力部（MoEL）和項目運營商協調的伊拉克EV充電樁部署，預期採用OCPP（開放充電點協議）進行後台通訊，與伊拉克初期電動汽車基礎設施正在採用的IEC體系方向保持一致。OCPP合規性支持聯網充電樁運行所必需的遠程監控、故障通知、訪問控制和負載管理功能。進口電氣設備通過COSQC須滿足IEC 61000體系EMC合規要求；IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流發射）和IEC 61000-3-3（電壓波動和閃變）適用於充電樁安裝。伊拉克不穩定的電網環境使EMC和電能質量設計對於充電樁可靠運行尤為重要。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方已發布來源確認伊拉克針對EV充電樁的單一官方OCPP強制要求；應與具體項目運營商和MoEL確認。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
COSQC conformity assessment — EMC evidence required for electrical equipment imports

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack still uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 deployments. China EMC test evidence is typically based on GB/T 17625 (harmonic emissions) and GB/T 17799 series (immunity), which correspond to IEC 61000 series but are not automatically accepted as COSQC-recognised evidence without verification.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2部署所要求的PP/CP信号。中国EMC测试证据通常基于GB/T 17625（谐波发射）和GB/T 17799系列（抗扰度），虽对应IEC 61000系列，但未经验证不能自动视为COSQC认可证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2部署所要求的PP/CP信號。中國EMC測試證據通常基於GB/T 17625（諧波發射）和GB/T 17799系列（抗擾度），雖對應IEC 61000系列，但未經驗證不能自動視為COSQC認可證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 17625 series — harmonic current emissions (China equivalent to IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17799 series — EMC immunity (China equivalent to IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports the OCPP version required by the Iraq project operator and MoEL; (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (3) IEC 61000 series EMC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory are prepared for COSQC conformity assessment; (4) remote monitoring, fault-reporting, and load-management functions meet Iraq project requirements; (5) EMC design accounts for Iraq's unstable grid environment. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP back-office implementation cannot be integrated with IEC-aligned Iraq project management systems.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持伊拉克项目运营商和MoEL所要求的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 准备ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC测试报告以供COSQC合格评定；(4) 远程监控、故障报告和负载管理功能符合伊拉克项目要求；(5) EMC设计考虑伊拉克不稳定电网环境。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP后台实现的充电桩无法与伊拉克IEC体系项目管理系统集成。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持伊拉克項目運營商和MoEL所要求的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 準備ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC測試報告以供COSQC合格評定；(4) 遠程監控、故障報告和負載管理功能符合伊拉克項目要求；(5) EMC設計考慮伊拉克不穩定電網環境。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP後台實現的充電樁無法與伊拉克IEC體系項目管理系統集成。

mandatory_status.target: Expected for IEC-aligned Iraq networked charger deployments — OCPP back-office integration required by project operators and MoEL-coordinated installations; IEC 61000 EMC evidence required for COSQC conformity; confirm with specific project requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for IEC-aligned Iraq project management system integration; China EMC evidence requires verification for COSQC acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office capability and IEC 61000 EMC evidence are both required for IEC-aligned Iraq EV charger deployments. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot integrate with IEC-based Iraq project management systems without firmware and communication-stack redesign. IEC 61000 EMC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory must be prepared for COSQC conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP后台能力和IEC 61000 EMC证据均为伊拉克IEC体系EV充电桩部署所必需。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法与伊拉克IEC体系项目管理系统集成。COSQC合格评定须准备ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000 EMC测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP後台能力和IEC 61000 EMC證據均為伊拉克IEC體系EV充電樁部署所必需。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法與伊拉克IEC體系項目管理系統集成。COSQC合格評定須準備ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000 EMC測試報告。
